module.name: EndPoint Monitor
module.changelog: *1.0.0* Adds reconciliation-driven email alert settings and per-recipient alert history without background workers. *0.2.2* Adds transition-based status history during reconciliation without alerting. *0.2.1* Adds FreePBX CSRF validation for AJAX actions, narrows discovery to PJSIP extension devices/users, maps NonQual to Registered (No Qualify), and documents CLI parsing technical debt. *0.2.0* Adds PJSIP endpoint discovery, per-endpoint monitoring toggles, persisted current status fields, and a manual read-only contact refresh. *0.1.0* Initial scaffold-only module shell. Adds FreePBX module identity, install/uninstall hooks, admin page, assets, and placeholder endpoint monitoring sections. No endpoint monitoring logic yet.
module.description: EndPoint Monitor scaffold for future PJSIP endpoint/contact status monitoring and alerting.
